message:
Add recipe-based triage filtering and expand conformance coverage

New recipe system (src/analysis/recipe.rs) enabling declarative
filter/sort/limit configurations for triage output customization.
Conformance test suite gains +78 lines covering recipe parsing,
filter application, and sort ordering. README and feature parity
docs updated to reflect new capabilities.

- src/analysis/recipe.rs: new module with Recipe, FilterConfig,
  SortConfig types and application logic for triage results
- tests/conformance.rs: +78 lines of recipe conformance tests
- FEATURE_PARITY.md: updated parity tracking for recipe support
- README.md: documentation for recipe-based filtering
- .beads/issues.jsonl: issue tracker sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
